0.text: Diffuse mild ectasia within bronchial structures of both lungs

1.text: Peribronchial thickening centrally within bronchial structures of both lungs

2.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

4.text: Several subcentimeter nodules within both lungs

5.text: Calcifications within some nodules in both lungs
